'''Saluup Fing''' was a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]], Fing was placed in charge of the defenses of [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]] while [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] led the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] during the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]]. While the armada was engaged at [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] entered the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]], causing massive damage to Yuuzhan'tar. After some order was restored, Saluup Fing requested permission from Warmaster Choka to attack Zonama Sekot, but Choka ordered him to keep his fleet in their current positions, as the armada at Mon Calamari was already on their way back to Yuuzhan'tar.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
